reasoning: Query asks about staying in Buddhist temples (宿坊). Top results are unrelated Chinese-language ryokan SEO pages and prefecture overviews; one relevant Nagano shukubo article (玉照院) appears but is buried. 87 matches but signal-to-noise low.

reasoning: Heritage 009 (800-year tea history in Kyoto Yamashiro) directly addresses deep tea-ceremony intent with concrete sites (Uji, 通圓茶屋, 興聖寺, 上林春松家). Solid official source. Story 035 (military ports) less relevant but doesn't block usability.

reasoning: Query about mountain villages with sparse train service. Results dominated by 'About This Page' / link policy / cookie chrome and DMO planning PDFs. Only Tsugaru DMO mentions local railways, no concrete villages or schedules.

reasoning: 507 MAFF GI foods is a strong, official corpus, but query asks for 'not yet mainstream' foods. Top hits (Kobe beef, Yubari melon, Tajima beef) are the most mainstream. Constraint about lesser-known is ignored.
missing_data: A 'fame/obscurity' signal so agent can filter for niche regional GI items
improvement_hint: Add a popularity/fame metric (page views, search volume) so agent can sort ascending for 'lesser-known' queries.

reasoning: Same dataset as L4-01 in Japanese. Same critique: 'まだメジャーじゃない' constraint ignored — top-ranked items (神戸ビーフ, 夕張メロン, 但馬牛) are nationally famous.
missing_data: Obscurity signal; filtering by registration recency or producer-group size

reasoning: 183 intangible cultural properties returned — but query asks for craftsman skills (職人技). Top results are festivals (Kibune, Okumakabuto, Kawagoe Hikawa, Yobuko Otsunahiki) — performing arts/folk events, not craft skills.

reasoning: Mt Fuji + related Wikidata entities returned. Mount Fuji itself is highly relevant for Hokusai imagery; however many entries are unrelated (interchange, athletic stadium, roller-coaster Fujiyama) that share the 富士 string. Hokusai-style viewpoints (三十六景) not surfaced.

improvement_hint: Add a 'cultural reference' map linking landmark IDs to Hokusai/Hiroshige print entries so visual queries can be answered.

reasoning: Query asks for UNESCO sites; tool returned 文化庁 Japan Heritage entries which are a different program (not UNESCO World Heritage). Information is correct but mismatches the user's UNESCO frame.

reasoning: Strong Jomon-themed results: Sannai-Maruyama Jomon Jiyukan, Komakino site museum, Nagano black-obsidian experience, Yamanashi Jomon walk Vol.3. Aligns well with intent — areas where Jomon culture is part of daily/experiential life.
